subcodes.first_line: You have asked Me a question with regard to the gathering of the children of Israel in Jerusalem in accordance with the prophecy.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در خصوص اجتماع سلاله اسراایل در اورشلیم بموجب نصوص انبیاء سوال نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @outward and inward meanings, @predictions and prophecies
